masked_case_json.world_change: a broad “ai will destroy seat-based software” narrative tempted investors to short established workflow-software businesses as a cohort. however, primary-source updates across multiple software names showed that some of these companies were still growing revenue, paid usage, or subscription metrics while embedding ai into the product; the cohort was not monolithic enough for a blanket short. presented in a shifted, non-identifying market era with no date, administration, calendar-quarter, or contemporaneous-news cues.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Fake-date companion for vc_post_cutoff_seat_model_narrative_001. Same underlying resolved outcome and same structural evidence; only era/date cues are shifted. Acceptance requires the model decision and direction to remain invariant versus the parent.
